latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $101,813 · day −0.48% · SPY +0.45% · alpha −0.93%
latest_messages.body: Quiet, slightly-down day and we lagged a rising market — mostly because ~44% of the account sits in cash, which can't rise on a green day. No trades, all four safety nets resting, every thesis intact. This week we trailed the market by ~3.2 points (cash drag); holding fire until Tuesday's JPMorgan earnings + June inflation print to redeploy on verified data.
